chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2872 of 20222 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 28.02.2025 Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, taken on record. It is jointly submitted that the controversy is pending before the learned Appellate Tribunal for adjudication, therefore, this petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
